Course closed for this cycle: Asian and Middle Eastern Studies (East Asian Popular Culture Across Time) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
Sep. 3, 2025
Application deadline
May. 14, 2026
These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Asian and Middle Eastern Studies (East Asian Popular Culture Across Time) is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The primary aim of the programme is to develop a rigorous and innovative understanding of popular culture in East Asia from the sixteenth and seventeenth centuries to the present.
